releaseNotes:
Release notes — v0.4.0
Contacts
First name and Last name are separate columns on the Contact list.
Sortable headers — click First name, Last name, Email, Phone, or Type to sort (toggle asc/desc).
Soft delete with 30-day recovery — deleting a contact moves it to Deleted contacts; restore or delete forever from there. Expired entries are purged after 30 days.
Linked bookings keep their dates and names; only the active profile is hidden until restored.
Bookings (family)
Update contact record checkbox when a family booking is linked to a CRM contact.
Unchecked (default): changes stay on the booking only — useful when one family member stays and you don’t want to overwrite the saved household.
Checked: syncs primary guest details, allergies, and family members to the contact as before.
Weekly & daily schedule — meals
Meals row shows guest counts and planned recipes together (no separate Dinner row).
Menus come from the in-app Meal planner (/meals/plan); recipe names link to your recipe library.
Paprika cloud meal plan removed — no live sync from Paprika on weekly/daily views or in Settings → Integrations.
Weekly print layout tuned for A4 landscape — row heights scale with meal/allergy content; fit-to-page scaling improved.
Still available
Import Paprika library (Meals → Import Paprika library) — one-time import of .paprikarecipes / .paprikarecipe files into recipes. Not connected to Paprika’s live meal plan.
Settings
Integrations page focuses on Meal planner and Value of Service (Paprika account settings removed).
